overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. The sun breaks through dramatic clouds behind a snow-capped peak, casting warm light across the landscape while birds occasionally fly through the frame.

segments.scene_description: A hooded character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. The snow-capped central mountain dominates the horizon, backlit by warm sunlight filtering through dramatic clouds. Below, a calm lake rests in the valley surrounded by dense forests, while birds occasionally fly across the sky. The character remains stationary, observing the panoramic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, panoramic gaze from a rocky precipice overlooking a vast, sun-drenched mountain valley. It begins with a hooded character standing motionless on the cliff's edge, framing a wide vista where a snow-capped peak dominates the horizon. As the camera lingers, warm sunlight filters through dramatic clouds to backlight the central mountain, casting a golden glow across the landscape. The scene then expands downward to reveal a calm lake nestled within dense forests in the valley below, while birds drift occasionally across the open sky.
